item.title: SpaceX 正式启动 IPO，估值 1.25 万亿美元，或成史上最大规模上市
item.guid: SpaceX-正式启动-IPO，估值-1.25-万亿美元，或成史上最大规模上市
item.description:
According to The New York Times, today, SpaceX publicly submitted its IPO application documents, disclosing the company's financial status for the first time. 据《纽约时报》报道，今天，SpaceX 公开递交 IPO 申请文件，首次披露公司财务状况。

SpaceX's revenue last year reached $18.67 billion, a year-on-year increase of 33%; however, it incurred a net loss of $4.9 billion, a significant reversal compared to a profit of $791 million in 2024. In the first quarter of this year, the company's revenue was $4.7 billion, with a net loss of approximately $4.3 billion.

SpaceX plans to list on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SPCX, aiming to begin trading as early as June. The company's self-valuation is $1.25 trillion, and it reportedly intends to raise $50 billion to $75 billion through this IPO, potentially surpassing Saudi Aramco's 2020 IPO record of $29.4 billion to become the largest IPO in history. SpaceX 计划在纳斯达克上市，股票代码为 SPCX，目标最早于 6 月挂牌交易。公司自我估值为 1.25 万亿美元，据报道拟通过此次 IPO 募资 500 亿至 750 亿美元，有望超过沙特阿美 2020 年 IPO 创下的 294 亿美元纪录，成为史上规模最大的 IPO。

Regarding the equity structure, SpaceX will issue two classes of common stock, Class A and Class B, with Class B shares having 10 votes per share. According to S-1 documents, Musk holds over 50% of the common stock and controls 85.1% of the voting rights through super-voting shares. Based on current valuations, his stake is worth over $635 billion. 在股权结构方面，SpaceX 将发行 A 类和 B 类两类普通股，B 类股每股拥有 10 票投票权。据 S-1 文件，马斯克持有超过 50% 的普通股，并通过超级投票股控制 85.1% 的投票权。按当前估值计算，其持股价值逾 6350 亿美元。

Notably, the IPO filing also disclosed that Anthropic has agreed to pay SpaceX $1.25 billion per month for cloud computing infrastructure fees, with the contract lasting until May 2029, equivalent to approximately $15 billion annually. The two parties announced their collaboration earlier this month. 值得注意的是，IPO 文件还披露，Anthropic 已同意向 SpaceX 支付每月 12.5 亿美元的云计算基础设施费用，合约持续至 2029 年 5 月，相当于每年约 150 亿美元，双方于本月早些时候宣布合作。

Bloomberg also reported that, according to sources, SpaceX is expected to proceed with the acquisition of AI programming startup Cursor 30 days after initiating public trading. SpaceX's first day of public trading is anticipated to be June 12. 另据彭博社报道，知情人士称 SpaceX 预计将在启动公开交易 30 天后推进对 AI 编程创业公司 Cursor 的收购。SpaceX 的公开交易首日预计安排在 6 月 12 日。

Bloomberg previously reported that if the deal fails to close, SpaceX will pay Cursor a cash breakup fee of up to $10 billion. 据彭博社此前报道，如果交易未能完成，SpaceX 将向 Cursor 支付高达 100 亿美元现金分手费。

item.title: 录音曝光：扎克伯格称用员工键鼠操作数据训练 AI，因为「外包不够聪明」
item.guid: 录音曝光：扎克伯格称用员工键鼠操作数据训练-AI，因为「外包不够聪明」
item.description:
American labor media More Perfect Union yesterday exposed an internal recording in which Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg admitted at an all-hands meeting on April 30 that the company has implemented an internal tracking project called the 'Model Capability Program,' which uses employees' daily operational data, recorded through mouse tracks, keyboard presses, and screenshots, for AI model training. 美国劳工媒体 More Perfect Union 昨天曝光了一条内部录音，内容是 Meta CEO 马克 · 扎克伯格于 4 月 30 日全员会议上承认，公司已推行名为「模型能力计划」的内部追踪项目，通过记录员工的鼠标轨迹、键盘按键及屏幕截图，将其日常操作数据用于 AI 模型训练。

Zuckerberg's rationale for this is that the average intelligence level of Meta employees is significantly higher than that of outsourced personnel typically used for training data collection. The programming behaviors and computer operating habits of thousands of elite engineers constitute high-quality training material that competitors cannot replicate, which can help Meta's models widen the gap with peers in coding capabilities. 对此，扎克伯格给出的理由是：Meta 员工的平均智力水平远高于通常用于训练数据采集的外包人员，数千名精英工程师的编程行为和电脑操作习惯，是竞争对手无法复制的高质量训练素材，可帮助 Meta 模型在代码能力上拉开与同行的差距。

Addressing privacy concerns, he assured that the data would not be manually reviewed or used for performance evaluations, and emphasized that the project must remain confidential externally due to intense AI competition. 针对隐私质疑，他保证数据不会经人工审查、不用于绩效考核，并以 AI 竞争激烈为由强调项目须对外保密。

This disclosure occurred around the time Meta announced layoffs of approximately 8,000 people. Some employees expressed resistance to being asked to contribute operational data to train AI systems that might eventually replace them. Zuckerberg stated that if the project proves effective, it will be rolled out company-wide. 这一披露发生在 Meta 宣布裁员约 8000 人的前后。部分员工对被要求贡献操作数据、进而训练可能取代自身的 AI 系统表示抵触。扎克伯格表示，若项目证明有效，将在全公司范围内推广。

item.title: 英伟达一季度营收 816 亿美元，数据中心营收暴增 92%
item.guid: 英伟达一季度营收-816-亿美元，数据中心营收暴增-92%
item.description:
Nvidia yesterday released its first-quarter fiscal year 2027 results for the period ending April 26, with quarterly revenue reaching $81.6 billion, a 20% increase quarter-over-quarter and an 85% increase year-over-year. Key highlights include: 英伟达昨日发布截至 4 月 26 日的 2027 财年第一季度业绩，季度营收达到 816 亿美元，环比增长 20%，同比增长 85%。其中：

    Data Center revenue was $75.2 billion, up 92% year-over-year and 21% quarter-over-quarter, marking an all-time high; within this, Compute revenue was $60.4 billion, up 77% year-over-year; Networking revenue was $14.8 billion, up 199% year-over-year;

    Edge Computing revenue was $6.4 billion, up 29% year-over-year and 10% quarter-over-quarter;

    GAAP gross margin was 74.9%, and non-GAAP gross margin was 75.0%, both significantly higher than 60.5% / 60.8% in the same period last year;

    GAAP diluted earnings per share were $2.39, up 214% year-over-year; non-GAAP diluted earnings per share were $1.87, up 140% year-over-year;

    Net cash flow from operating activities was $50.344 billion; free cash flow was $48.554 billion.

Looking ahead to the next quarter, Nvidia projects second-quarter fiscal year 2027 revenue of approximately $91 billion (plus or minus 2%), with the company explicitly stating that this guidance does not include any data center computing revenue from China. GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins are expected to be 74.9% and 75.0%, respectively. 展望下一季度，英伟达预计 2027 财年第二季度营收约 910 亿美元（上下浮动 2%），公司明确表示该指引未纳入任何来自中国的数据中心计算营收。GAAP 与 non-GAAP 毛利率预计分别为 74.9% 与 75.0%。

item.title: Meta 裁员约 8000 人，员工疯狂薅羊毛买 AirPods
item.guid: Meta-裁员约-8000-人，员工疯狂薅羊毛买-AirPods
item.description:
According to Wired, Meta initiated a new round of layoffs on the 20th, affecting approximately 8,000 employees, which is about 10% of the company's nearly 80,000 total employees. Layoff notices will be sent simultaneously at 4 AM local time in Singapore, London, and San Francisco via employees' personal and company emails. 据《连线》报道，Meta 已于 20 日启动新一轮裁员，涉及约 8000 名员工，占公司近 8 万名员工总数的 10% 左右。裁员通知将分别于新加坡、伦敦、旧金山当地时间凌晨 4 时通过员工个人及公司邮箱同步发出。

After the layoff news was confirmed, several employees revealed to Wired that there was a concentrated phenomenon of 'welfare harvesting' within the company. Some employees rushed to spend their annual $2,000 flexible benefits allowance on health and living expenses before the deadline; 裁员消息确认后，多名员工向《连线》透露，公司内部出现集中「薅福利」现象。有员工赶在截止前花完每年 2000 美元的弹性福利额度，用于健康及生活开支；

Other employees quickly used their triennial $200 audio equipment subsidy to purchase headphones like AirPods. Meanwhile, multiple Meta offices in New York and Menlo Park were almost empty this week, with employees either polishing their resumes elsewhere or gathering with colleagues to say goodbye. Management also advised employees not to come to the office that day. 另有员工抢用每三年一次、价值 200 美元的音频设备补贴，购买 AirPods 等耳机。与此同时，Meta 在纽约和门洛帕克的多处办公室本周已近乎空置，员工或在外打磨简历，或与同事聚集道别。管理层亦建议员工当天不必到岗。

item.title: 微信正灰度测试本机号码登录功能
item.guid: 微信正灰度测试本机号码登录功能
item.description:
According to IT Home, WeChat recently updated new test versions across multiple platforms, bringing with it a large number of new grayscale testing features. Yesterday, an iOS user reported that WeChat is grayscale testing a brand new login method: 'Log in with this device's number'. 据 IT 之家报道，微信最近更新了多个平台的新测试版本，随之出现的还有大量新的灰度测试功能。昨日有 iOS 用户反馈称微信正灰度测试一项全新的登录方式「用本机号码登录」。

Some users will see this new option on the login screen when re-logging into their WeChat account after logging out, or when logging into a WeChat account on a device that is not being used for the first time. 部分用户在退出微信账号后重新登录时，或于非首次登录的设备上登录微信账号时，会在登录界面看到这一新增选项。

After clicking this button, the system will automatically identify the mobile number bound to the current SIM card through the mobile number authentication service provided by the operator, without the need for manual password entry or SMS verification codes. Cellular data needs to be kept on when using this function. 点击该按钮后，系统将通过运营商提供的手机号认证服务，自动识别当前 SIM 卡绑定的手机号，无需手动输入密码或短信验证码，使用该功能时需要保持蜂窝数据开启。

item.title: 连续四年业绩下滑，GoPro 考虑出售或合并
item.guid: 连续四年业绩下滑，GoPro-考虑出售或合并
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, action camera manufacturer GoPro announced the initiation of a strategic review, considering selling the company or seeking a merger. It is reported that the list of potential buyers includes large technology companies, outdoor consumer brands, and U.S. defense contractors, but specific negotiation progress has not yet been disclosed. 据界面新闻报道，运动相机厂商 GoPro 宣布启动战略评估，考虑出售公司或寻求合并。据悉，潜在买家名单涵盖大型科技公司、户外消费品牌及美国国防承包商，但目前尚未披露具体谈判进展。

The background of this strategic review is GoPro's continuously deteriorating financial situation. Financial report data shows that in 2025, GoPro's revenue was $652 million, a year-on-year decrease of 19%, with a net loss of $93.5 million, marking its fourth consecutive year of declining performance. 此次战略评估的背景是 GoPro 持续恶化的财务状况。财报数据显示，2025 年 GoPro 营收 6.52 亿美元，同比下滑 19%，净亏损 9350 万美元，已连续第四年业绩下滑。

item.title: IEA：今年全球电动车销量将达 2300 万辆
item.guid: IEA：今年全球电动车销量将达-2300-万辆
item.description:
According to Electrek, the International Energy Agency (IEA) predicts in its new Global EV Outlook that global electric vehicle sales will reach 23 million units in 2026, accounting for nearly 30% of global new car sales. 据 Electrek 报道，国际能源署在新版 Global EV Outlook 中预计，2026 年全球电动汽车销量将达到 2300 万辆，约占全球新车销量近 30%。

The report shows that global EV sales in 2025 have exceeded 20 million units, a year-on-year increase of 20%, with 1 out of every 4 new cars sold being an EV. The IEA's forecast indicates that despite a slowdown in some markets, global electric mobility consumption continues to expand. 报告显示，2025 年全球电动车销量已超过 2000 万辆，同比增长 20%，新车销售中每 4 辆就有 1 辆为电动车。IEA 的预测说明，尽管部分市场增速放缓，全球电动出行消费仍保持扩张。

Electrek reported that the growth of the global EV market is jointly driven by China, Europe, and other regional markets. Electrek 报道称，全球电动车市场的增长来自中国、欧洲和其他区域市场共同推动。

item.title: 实际订单或仅 3 万笔，特朗普手机被曝数据泄露
item.guid: 实际订单或仅-3-万笔，特朗普手机被曝数据泄露
item.description:
YouTuber Voidzilla, with 1.55 million subscribers, posted a video yesterday claiming that the Trump Mobile official website has an 'easily accessible' security vulnerability that allows customer data to be obtained through simple operations. He stated that his mailing address, email address, and order information were all accessible, but credit card information was not affected. 拥有 155 万订阅者的 YouTuber Voidzilla 昨日发布视频称，Trump Mobile 官网存在一处「唾手可得」的安全漏洞，可通过简单操作获取客户数据。他表示，自己的邮寄地址、电子邮件地址及订单信息均处于可访问状态，但信用卡信息未被波及。

According to Voidzilla, he received a reminder over the weekend that his information had been exposed, along with that of other Trump Mobile customers. The informant had previously tried to contact Trump Mobile but received no response. 据 Voidzilla 介绍，他在周末收到他人提醒，被告知自己的信息已遭暴露，同时受影响的还有其他 Trump Mobile 客户。该告知者此前已尝试联系 Trump Mobile，但未获回应。

Voidzilla then, along with another affected YouTuber Penguinz0, jointly attempted to contact the company, also without receiving any reply. Penguinz0 has confirmed that the vulnerability is real and that the personal information involved is accurate. Voidzilla 随后与另一名受影响的 YouTuber Penguinz0 共同尝试联系该公司，同样未收到任何回复。Penguinz0 已确认该漏洞真实存在，且所涉及的个人信息准确无误。

This incident also brought another layer of embarrassment: Voidzilla stated that by estimating from the exposed customer IDs, the actual number of unique Trump Mobile customers is about 10,000, with approximately 30,000 orders, a stark contrast to the previously claimed 600,000 orders. 此次事件还带出了另一层尴尬：Voidzilla 称，通过暴露的客户 ID 推算，Trump Mobile 实际独立客户数量约为 1 万人，订单数量约为 3 万笔，与此前对外宣称的 60 万笔订单相差悬殊。

item.title: 曝 DeepSeek 组建 Harness 团队，编程智能体或在路上
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-组建-Harness-团队，编程智能体或在路上
item.description:
According to Jiaziguangnian, DeepSeek is internally forming a Harness team focused on code AI agent products, internally benchmarking against Anthropic's Claude Code. DeepSeek senior researcher Chen Deli confirmed this news on social media yesterday. 据甲子光年报道，DeepSeek 内部正在组建 Harness 团队，方向为代码 AI 智能体产品，内部对标 Anthropic 旗下的 Claude Code。DeepSeek 资深研究员陈德里昨日在社交媒体证实了这一消息。

Recruitment information shows that DeepSeek has opened two positions: Harness Product Manager and Harness R&D Engineer, with the work location limited to Beijing. 招聘信息显示，DeepSeek 开放了 Harness 产品经理和 Harness 研发工程师两个岗位，工作地点限北京。

The job description lists 'Model + Harness = Agent' as the core formula, clearly stating that capabilities such as context management, tool invocation, task planning, file reading/writing, and terminal execution are key for AI agents to truly integrate into workflows. JD 将「Model + Harness = Agent」列为核心公式，明确指出上下文管理、工具调用、任务规划、文件读写、终端执行等能力，才是 AI 智能体真正进入工作流的关键。

This team will participate in the entire process of the 'DeepSeek Desktop Agent Product' and collaborate deeply with the model training team to achieve the 'co-evolution' of the model and Harness. 该团队将参与「DeepSeek 桌面端 Agent 产品」全过程，并与模型训练团队深度协作，实现模型与 Harness 的「共同进化」。

item.title: iPhone 绝版配件回归：448 元
item.guid: iPhone-绝版配件回归：448-元
item.description:
Recently, Apple has re-listed the previously limited edition 'Hikawa Phone Grip Stand' phone grip and stand, and updated its color scheme. 近期，苹果再次上架了此前限量版「Hikawa Phone Grip Stand」手机握把与支架，并且更新了配色。

It is reported that Apple launched the 'Hikawa Phone Grip Stand' phone grip and stand to commemorate the company's 40 years of dedication to accessibility design. 据悉，苹果推出「Hikawa Phone Grip Stand」手机握把与支架，是为了纪念公司在无障碍设计领域深耕 40 周年。

According to Jiemian News, due to its limited release, this accessory quickly sold out after its launch last year and then fell into a long-term out-of-stock state. After selling out, the price of this accessory soared on second-hand trading platforms, with a premium exceeding 80%, and some rare colorways were even speculated to over 800 yuan. 据界面新闻报道，由于是限量发售，在去年上线后，这款配件就很快售罄，随后陷入长期缺货状态。售罄后，该配件在二手交易平台上价格一路飙升，溢价幅度超过 80%，部分稀缺配色甚至被炒至 800 元以上。

The accessory was co-designed by Los Angeles designer Bailey Hikawa, made from high-end silicone material, and specifically created for MagSafe-compatible iPhone models. It reduces the force required for users to keep their phone stable, aiming to help disabled users hold their devices more easily and securely. 该配件由洛杉矶设计师 Bailey Hikawa 联合设计，采用高端硅胶材质，专为兼容 MagSafe 的 iPhone 机型打造，可减少用户保持手机稳定所需的力量，旨在帮助残障用户更轻松地稳固持握设备。

item.title: 佳能打印机接入米家 App，首批支持 61 款
item.guid: 佳能打印机接入米家-App，首批支持-61-款
item.description: Yesterday, Canon printers announced their integration with the Mijia App. The first batch supports mainstream product lines including Canon's Little G Spirit series, GX Gongxi series, TS series, TR series, and E series, totaling 61 inkjet printers. Users can complete remote printing, device connection, and status viewing via their mobile phones. 昨天，佳能打印机宣布接入米家 App，首批支持包括佳能小 G 灵系列、GX 恭喜系列、TS 系列、TR系 列以及 E 系列等主流产品线，共计 61 款喷墨打印机。用户可通过手机完成远程打印、设备连接和状态查看。

item.title: 华为 HiCar 合作车型超过 600 款、覆盖率超苹果 CarPlay
item.guid: 华为-HiCar-合作车型超过-600-款、覆盖率超苹果-CarPlay
item.description:
Yesterday, Yichebang released a review of mobile phone-car connectivity in the domestic passenger car market. Huawei Mobile's official account then reposted it and disclosed HiCar cooperation data. 昨天，易车榜发布国内乘用车市场手机车机互联盘点，华为手机官方随后转发并披露 HiCar 合作数据。

    Over 70 cooperating car brands, cumulative installed capacity exceeding 40 million units, and over 600 cooperating car models;

    New car models launched in April 2026 with adoption rates: HUAWEI HiCar 63.1%, CarPlay 56.8%, Carlink 44.5%;

    Market share from January to April 2026: HUAWEI HiCar approximately 57.0%, CarPlay approximately 47.8%, Carlink approximately 30.3%.

item.title: 趋境科技完成数亿元 Pre-A 轮融资
item.guid: 趋境科技完成数亿元-Pre-A-轮融资
item.description:
AI Token production service provider Approaching.AI recently announced the completion of a pre-A round of financing worth hundreds of millions of yuan. This round was co-led by Xinglian Capital and Huakong Technology, with follow-on investments from institutions such as Honghui Capital, Tianhao Energy, Shangshi Capital, Tianjin Ren'ai Hongsheng, and Hangzhou Fucheng, and continued additional investment from existing shareholder Gaoling Ventures. AI Token 生产服务商趋境科技（Approaching.AI）近日宣布完成数亿元 Pre-A 轮融资。本轮由星连资本与华控科技联合领投，弘晖资本、天壕能源、尚势资本、天津仁爱弘盛、杭州福成等机构跟投，老股东高瓴创投持续加注。

After the financing, Approaching.AI will increase its investment in its high-performance AI Token production service platform ATaaS (Approaching AI Token as a Service), focusing on advancing computing power reserves and the construction of underlying inference systems. 融资完成后，趋境科技将加大对其高效能 AI Token 生产服务平台 ATaaS（Approaching AI Token as a Service）的投入，重点推进算力储备与底层推理系统建设。

The company stated that the ATaaS platform currently processes nearly a trillion tokens daily and has provided services to enterprise clients such as Zhipu GLM and Moonshot AI's Kimi. 公司称，ATaaS 平台目前日均处理 Token 量近万亿，已为智谱 GLM、月之暗面 Kimi 等企业级客户提供服务。

item.title: 贝塔无限完成种子+轮融资，定位消费级具身智能
item.guid: 贝塔无限完成种子+轮融资，定位消费级具身智能
item.description:
According to MIT Technology Review, embodied AI startup Beta Infinity has completed a seed+ round of financing. This round was co-led by Shengqu Taihe Fund, participated by Century Huatong, and Heli Capital, with follow-on investments from institutions such as Yida Capital and Nanshan Zhanxintou; the cumulative financing amount for the two rounds since the company's establishment has reached hundreds of millions of yuan. 据《MIT 科技评论》报道，具身智能初创公司贝塔无限 Beta Infinity 完成种子+轮融资。本轮由世纪华通参与的盛趣泰和基金与和利资本联合领投，毅达资本、南山战新投等机构跟投；公司成立后两轮累计融资金额达数亿元。

Beta Infinity was co-founded by former Huawei and ByteDance executives, focusing on consumer-grade embodied AI. The raised funds will be used for core technology research and development and product prototyping. 贝塔无限由前华为、字节跳动高管联合创办，方向是消费级具身智能。融资资金将用于核心技术研发和产品试制。

item.title: 渣打计划到 2030 年裁员近 8000 人
item.guid: 渣打计划到-2030-年裁员近-8000-人
item.description:
According to 21st Century Business Herald, Standard Chartered Group released its medium-to-long-term sustainable growth strategy, proposing to cut over 15% of corporate function-related positions by 2030. Based on the group's global workforce of approximately 82,000 employees, this involves nearly 8,000 positions. 据 21 世纪经济报道，渣打集团发布中长期可持续增长战略，提出到 2030 年削减超过 15% 的企业职能相关岗位。按集团全球约 8.2 万名员工测算，涉及岗位接近 8000 个。

Standard Chartered also set efficiency and return targets: achieving an approximate 20% increase in revenue per employee by 2028, and an approximate 18% return on tangible shareholders' equity by 2030. The company stated that the next phase of growth will rely on a more streamlined, efficient, and closely connected operating model, and will strengthen automation, advanced analytics, and artificial intelligence applications. 渣打同时给出效率和回报目标：2028 年前实现人均创收提升约 20%，2030 年有形股东权益回报约 18%。公司称，下一阶段增长将依赖更精简、高效及紧密连接的运营模式，并加强自动化、先进分析和人工智能应用。

CEO Bill Winters stated in the report that this is not simply about cost reduction, but rather, in some cases, replacing low-value human capital with financial and investment capital. Standard Chartered's operating income in the first quarter was $5.9 billion, a 9% year-on-year increase, making the layoff plan seem more like a financial institution proactively incorporating AI and automation into organizational restructuring. CEO Bill Winters 在报道中称，这不是简单降成本，而是在部分情况下用金融资本和投资资本替代低价值人力资本。渣打第一季度经营收入为 59 亿美元，同比上升 9%，裁员计划因此更像是金融机构主动把 AI 和自动化纳入组织重构。

item.title: 💡 Take-Two CEO：AI 可以加速开发，但做不出下一个 GTA
item.guid: 💡-Take-Two-CEO：AI-可以加速开发，但做不出下一个-GTA
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Strauss Zelnick, CEO of Take-Two (Rockstar Games' parent company), stated in David Senra's podcast that he supports the use of AI in game development, believing that AI can improve efficiency in some production stages, but does not believe it can create the next "GTA" from scratch. 据 Business Insider 报道，R 星母公司 Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick 在 David Senra 的播客中表示，他支持在游戏开发中使用 AI，认为 AI 可以提升部分制作环节的效率，但不认为它可以从零创造出下一个《GTA》。

Zelnick believes that AI is essentially built upon large datasets, computing power, and large language models, and data inherently looks to the past. He pointed out that AI can produce products similar to GTA, but "imitations don't sell well"; AI is currently good at asset generation, but the birth of a blockbuster game is not equivalent to material production. Zelnick 认为，AI 本质上建立在大型数据集、算力和大语言模型之上，而数据天然面向过去。他指出，AI 可以制作出类似 GTA 的产品，但「模仿品本来就卖不好」；AI 目前擅长资产生成，但爆款游戏的诞生不等于素材生产。

AI can create another GTA-style product, but imitations won't sell.

These remarks addressed investors' concerns about AI lowering game development barriers and impacting large publishers. Zelnick's judgment is that game tools are already widespread; what is scarce is not the tools, but originality, a sense of surprise, and the ability to hit cultural relevance; 这番话回应了投资者对 AI 降低游戏开发门槛、冲击大型发行商的担忧。Zelnick 的判断是，游戏工具早已普及，稀缺的不是工具，而是原创性、意外感和文化命中能力；

He previously pointed out that Take-Two allows employees to use AI tools like Claude and Gemini, but increased efficiency will, in turn, raise content scale and quality targets. 他此前曾指出，Take-Two 允许员工使用 Claude、Gemini 等 AI 工具，但效率提升也会反过来抬高内容规模和质量目标。

item.title: 4799 元，索尼新降噪耳机上线
item.guid: 4799-元，索尼新降噪耳机上线
item.description:
Yesterday, Sony officially launched the "1000X 10th Anniversary Collector's Edition" over-ear wireless noise-canceling headphones, priced at 4799 yuan. According to the official introduction, the 1000X 10th Anniversary Collector's Edition features a dual-chip combination of the HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3 and the high-performance integrated processor V3. 昨天，索尼正式推出头戴式无线降噪耳机「1000X 十周年典藏版」，售价 4799 元。官方介绍，1000X 十周年典藏版搭载 HD 降噪处理器 QN3 与高性能集成处理器 V3 的双芯组合。

In terms of acoustic hardware, the device is equipped with a newly developed unidirectional carbon fiber driver unit and a dynamic air pressure ring structure, and incorporates the circuit board layout technology of Sony Walkman players to control signal loss and improve the signal-to-noise ratio. 声学硬件方面，该设备配备新研发的单向碳纤维驱动单元与动态气压环结构，并引入索尼 Walkman 播放器的电路板布局工艺，以控制信号损失并提升信噪比。

It's worth mentioning that for the 1000X 10th Anniversary Collector's Edition, Sony also enlisted Grammy-level master tuners to co-create with multiple Grammy mastering engineers. 值得一提的是，这次索尼还给 1000X 十周年典藏版请来了格莱美级大师调音，与多位格莱美母带工程师共创。

In terms of features, the WH-1000XX is equipped with 360 Upmix spatial audio technology, supporting three independent scene modes for music, movies, and games, and features dedicated physical toggle buttons on the body. 功能方面，WH-1000XX 搭载 360 Upmix 空间音效技术，支持音乐、电影、游戏三种独立场景模式，机身配有专属物理切换按键。

In addition, the product supports the flagship DSEE Ultimate digital sound enhancement engine, features lambskin-like leather and metal-trimmed headbands for external components, and has widened headband cushions and earcup internal space for ergonomics. 此外，该产品支持 DSEE Ultimate 数字声音增强引擎旗舰版，外部件采用类小羊皮皮革与金属镶边头梁，并针对人体工学加宽了头梁缓冲垫及耳罩内部空间。

item.title: 3799 元起，iQOO15T 正式发布
item.guid: 3799-元起，iQOO15T-正式发布
item.description:
iQOO officially released the iQOO15T yesterday. The new phone is equipped with the MediaTek Dimensity 9500 Monster Edition flagship chip, focusing on performance, gaming, and long battery life. First, let's look at the prices: iQOO 昨日正式发布 iQOO15T，新机搭载联发科天玑 9500 Monster 版旗舰芯，主打性能、游戏和长续航。先看价格：

12GB + 256GB first sale for 3799 yuan, 16GB + 256GB first sale for 4199 yuan, 12GB + 512GB first sale for 4499 yuan, 16GB + 512GB first sale for 4899 yuan, 16GB + 1TB first sale for 5699 yuan.

    Dimensity 9500 Monster Edition + self-developed e-sports chip Q3;

    6.82-inch 2K screen, 1~144Hz LTPO, 4500nit peak brightness, 4000Hz instant touch sampling rate, 30.42ms click delay;

    8000mAh battery, 100W wired charging;

    200-megapixel main camera, CIPA 4.5-level anti-shake, 4x lossless zoom; 50-megapixel ultra-wide-angle, supports macro.

Also available are iQOO Pad 6 Pro and iQOO TWS 5i: 另外还有 iQOO Pad 6 Pro 和 iQOO TWS 5i：

    The iQOO Pad 6 Pro features a fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition processor, a 4K ultra-clear large screen (1200nits peak brightness), a 13000mAh long-lasting battery, 8 speakers, etc.; it offers four storage combinations, 8GB+256GB (up to 16GB+512GB optional), with a starting price of 4299 yuan;

    The iQOO TWS 5i retails for 119 yuan, featuring a 10mm large sound unit, Monster sound e-sports audio effects, 42ms full-link game low latency, and more.

item.title: 26.98 万元起，小鹏 GX 正式上市
item.guid: 26.98-万元起，小鹏-GX-正式上市
item.description:
Last night, Xpeng Motors officially released its flagship large six-seater SUV, the Xpeng GX, launching a total of 4 models with official guide prices ranging from 279,800 to 359,800 yuan, and limited-time prices from 269,800 to 349,800 yuan. 昨晚，小鹏汽车正式发布旗舰大六座 SUV 小鹏 GX，共推出 4 款车型，官方指导价为 27.98 万至 35.98 万元，限时售价 26.98 万至 34.98 万元。

    Body dimensions 5265 × 1999 × 1800 mm, wheelbase 3115 mm, drag coefficient 0.255;

    22-inch wheels, 265 mm front / 285 mm rear wide tires, available in five body colors;

    Regular trunk volume 673 L, expandable to a maximum of 1748 L;

    Extended-range version has a comprehensive range of 1585 km, pure electric CLTC range up to 750 km, 525 km range replenishment in 12 minutes;

    Equipped with the second-generation VLA large model, assisted driving computing power up to 3000 TOPS, supports autonomous parking in highway service areas without human intervention.

item.title: 华为 MatePad Pro Max 开启预售
item.guid: 华为-MatePad-Pro-Max-开启预售
item.description:
Huawei officially announced yesterday that pre-sales for the HUAWEI MatePad Pro Max have begun. 华为昨天正式宣布 HUAWEI MatePad Pro Max 开启预售。

The MatePad Pro Max has previously been unveiled and released overseas. It is reported that the new device is the thinnest and lightest tablet above 13 inches: featuring a 13.2-inch screen, a thickness of 4.7mm, and a weight of 499g. MatePad Pro Max 此前已在海外亮相并发布。据悉，新机为 13 英寸以上最轻薄的平板：采用 13.2 英寸屏幕，厚度 4.7mm、重量 499g。

The screen features 3K resolution, 144Hz refresh rate, and 1600nits brightness; notably, the new device adopts an ultra-narrow bezel + notch-free design. 屏幕方面采用 3K 分辨率、144Hz 刷新率以及 1600nits 亮度；值得关注的是，新机采用极窄边框 + 无刘海设计。

item.title: 荣耀 WIN Turbo 定档 5 月 29 日
item.guid: 荣耀-WIN-Turbo-定档-5-月-29-日
item.description:
Honor WIN officially announced yesterday that the Honor WIN Turbo will be released on May 29th at 15:00, with the new device focusing on performance and battery life. 荣耀 WIN 官方昨日宣布，荣耀 WIN Turbo 将于 5 月 29 日 15:00 发布，新机主打性能与续航。

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station", the new machine will be equipped with a 1.5K LTPS straight screen, built-in cooling fan + metal frame + 50MP OIS horizontal large matrix lens module, and will offer 16GB + 512GB specifications. 而据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，新机将配备 1.5K LTPS 直屏，内置散热风扇 + 金属中框 + 50MP OIS 横向大矩阵镜组，并提供 16GB + 512GB 规格。

item.title: Marshall 推出全新头戴式无线耳机 Milton A.N.C.
item.guid: Marshall-推出全新头戴式无线耳机-Milton-A.N.C.
item.description:
Marshall has launched its new Milton A.N.C. over-ear wireless headphones, continuing the brand's highly recognizable classic retro design language. With a lightweight and portable foldable design, combined with adaptive active noise cancellation and long-lasting battery life, it brings a more immersive listening experience suitable for mobile scenarios. Marshall 推出全新头戴式无线耳机 Milton A.N.C.，延续品牌极具辨识度的经典复古设计语言，并以轻巧便携的可折叠设计，结合自适应主动降噪与持久续航表现，带来更适合移动场景的沉浸聆听体验。

With active noise cancellation enabled, the Milton A.N.C. can continuously play for about 50 hours; with noise cancellation off, its battery life can reach about 80 hours, easily covering a full week's commute and more daily scenarios. Milton A.N.C. 开启主动降噪模式可持续聆听约 50 小时，关闭降噪后其续航更可达约 80 小时，轻松覆盖整周通勤与更多日常场景。

The new generation of adaptive active noise cancellation can analyze the surrounding environment in real-time and dynamically adjust the noise cancellation level; a light press can switch to transparency mode, allowing external sounds to enter naturally. 新一代自适应主动降噪功能可实时分析周围环境，动态调节降噪级别；轻按即可切换至通透模式，让外界声音自然进入。

In terms of acoustic performance, Milton A.N.C. adopts a new driver unit system, further improving active noise cancellation and call quality. The adaptive loudness function can adjust sound performance according to listening volume and ambient environment; the Soundstage spatial audio function expands stereo depth and width through Marshall's independently developed spatialization algorithm. 声学表现上，Milton A.N.C. 采用全新驱动单元系统，进一步提升主动降噪与通话效果。自适应响度功能可根据聆听音量与现场环境调整声音表现；Soundstage 空间音频功能则通过 Marshall 自主研发的空间化算法，拓展立体声纵深与宽度。

The Milton A.N.C. is priced at 1699 RMB and is available for sale on Marshall's global official website starting today, and will land on other official authorized channels on May 27th. Milton A.N.C. 售价为 1699 元人民币，即日起于 Marshall 全球官网开售，并将于 5 月 27 日登陆其他官方授权渠道。

item.title: 阿里云「芯-云-模型-推理」全面升级
item.guid: 阿里云「芯-云-模型-推理」全面升级
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud announced yesterday at the summit a full-stack upgrade for the era of AI agents, covering four layers: chips, cloud infrastructure, large models, and inference platforms. 阿里云昨日在峰会上宣布面向 AI 智能体时代的全栈升级，涵盖芯片、云基础设施、大模型及推理平台四个层面。

    Chips: T-Head released Wujian M890, with performance 3 times that of the previous generation Wujian 810E, built-in 144GB video memory, and inter-chip interconnection bandwidth of 800GB/s. The accompanying Panjiu AL128 ultra-node server can combine 128 AI chips into a single node, with P2P latency below 150ns;

    Cloud Infrastructure: Alibaba Cloud has transformed its cloud products into Skill-based, MCP-based, and CLI-based forms, allowing them to be called by AI agents as standard modules, and providing supporting capabilities such as sandbox execution environments, multi-agent collaboration, and cross-task memory;

    Large Models: Released the flagship model Qwen3.7-Max, which the official claims ranks first among domestic models in the Arena global blind test overall榜;

    Inference Platform: Bailian platform introduces context caching and throughput elastic scheduling, and will integrate third-party models such as Zhipu GLM-5.1, MiniMax M2.7, and Kimi K2.6. Alibaba Cloud also launched the model service platform "Qianwen Cloud", providing over 150 mainstream model APIs.

item.title: 华为发布自研音乐编创应用「音悦家」，内置 200+ 乐器音色
item.guid: 华为发布自研音乐编创应用「音悦家」，内置-200+-乐器音色
item.description:
Huawei officially released its self-developed music creation application, Yinyuejia, yesterday, covering four digital music creation scenarios: composition, recording, arrangement, and mixing, positioning itself as a professional mobile music creation studio. 华为昨日正式发布自研音乐编创应用音悦家，覆盖作曲、录音、编曲、混音四大数字音乐创作场景，定位专业移动音乐编创工作室。

Yinyuejia has over 200 built-in Chinese and Western musical instruments and professional synthesizer timbres, with the official stating that "one tablet is a band." For traditional Chinese instrument timbres, Yinyuejia collaborated with the Music Engineering Department of the Shanghai Conservatory of Music to specifically restore the timbres of traditional instruments such as the Tang-style vertical konghou and Tang-style curved-neck pipa, to promote the creation of Chinese-style music. 音悦家内置 200 余种中西方乐器及专业合成器音色，官方称「一台平板就是一支乐队」。在中国传统乐器音色方面，音悦家与上海音乐学院音乐工程系联合开发，专项还原仿唐制竖箜篌、仿唐制曲颈琵琶等传统乐器音色，以推动国风音乐创作。

item.title: 宜宾市与美团共建「放心外卖」平台
item.guid: 宜宾市与美团共建「放心外卖」平台
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the Yibin City Market Supervision Administration and Meituan platform recently signed a government-enterprise co-governance cooperation framework agreement to jointly build a "Safe Takeaway" food safety government-enterprise co-governance platform. Meituan will open exclusive accounts and query/operation permissions for local market supervision departments, used for merchant data queries, online assistance, and rectification notification pushes. 据新华社报道，宜宾市市场监督管理局与美团平台日前签订政企共治合作框架协议，共建「放心外卖」食安政企共治平台。美团将为当地市场监管部门开通专属账号和查询、操作权限，用于商户数据查询、在线协查和整改通知推送。

Platform functions include rider feedback, consumer feedback, status of governed merchants, open kitchens, merchant disposal, and a direct channel for government publicity. Yibin will also uniformly use food safety seals for takeaway orders in its jurisdiction to reduce the risk of secondary pollution during delivery. 平台功能包括骑手反馈、消费者反馈、已治理商户情况、明厨亮灶、商户处置和政务宣传直通车。宜宾还将在辖区外卖订单中统一使用食安封签，减少配送环节二次污染风险。

item.title: 初音未来与水月雨推出联名耳机礼盒
item.guid: 初音未来与水月雨推出联名耳机礼盒
item.description:
Moondrop, in collaboration with Hatsune Miku, has launched the MIRAGE exclusive gift box, which is now available on JD.com for full pre-order, priced at 239 yuan. 水月雨联合初音未来推出 MIRAGE 海市蜃楼联动专属礼盒，现已上架京东并开启全款预售，售价 239 元。

This gift box is based on Moondrop MIRAGE true wireless earphones, with an appearance that replicates Hatsune Miku V3's illustration, and comes with an onion-stalk-shaped protective case. The earphones support adaptive active noise cancellation, Bluetooth 6.0, and LHDC high-definition transmission, with a total battery life of up to 53.5 hours. 这款礼盒基于水月雨 MIRAGE 真无线耳机打造，外观复刻初音未来 V3 立绘，并配套葱段造型保护套。耳机支持自适应主动降噪、蓝牙 6.0 与 LHDC 高清传输，综合续航可达 53.5 小时。

item.title: 《死亡搁浅》主题 STRAND STORE 将在涩谷 PARCO 开幕
item.guid: 《死亡搁浅》主题-STRAND-STORE-将在涩谷-PARCO-开幕
item.description:
KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS, founded by Hideo Kojima, will open a limited-time pop-up store, "KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS × PARCO GAMES STRAND STORE," at Shibuya PARCO. 小岛秀夫创立的 KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS 将与 PARCO GAMES 在涩谷 PARCO 开设期间限定快闪店「KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS × PARCO GAMES STRAND STORE」。

The event centers around the "STRAND" concept from the Death Stranding series, extending Hideo Kojima's recurring theme of "connection" in the game to offline exhibitions, brand collaborations, and merchandise sales. 活动以《死亡搁浅》系列的「STRAND」概念为核心，把小岛秀夫在游戏中反复处理的「连接」主题，延伸到线下展陈、品牌联名和周边销售。

More than 15 brands will participate in this event, covering categories such as apparel, music, food, and lifestyle. The site will sell original event merchandise, new official KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS products, and new merchandise related to Death Stranding 2: On the Beach. 这次活动会有超过 15 个品牌参与，覆盖服装、音乐、食物和生活方式等品类。现场将销售活动原创商品、KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS 官方新品，以及《死亡搁浅2：冥滩之上》相关新周边。

The official introduction also updated the cross-media progress of the "Death Stranding" series: the cumulative number of players has exceeded 20 million; the A24 live-action film project, the feature-length animation "Death Stranding: Mosquito," and the 2027 Disney+ exclusive animation "DEATH STRANDING ISOLATIONS" are all in progress. 官方介绍中同时更新了《死亡搁浅》系列的跨媒介进展：系列累计玩家数已突破 2000 万；A24 真人电影项目、长篇动画《死亡搁浅：蚊》以及 2027 年 Disney+ 独播动画《DEATH STRANDING ISOLATIONS》都在推进。

item.title: 《黑袍纠察队》第五季大结局上线，七年故事正式收官
item.guid: 《黑袍纠察队》第五季大结局上线，七年故事正式收官
item.description:
The fifth season finale of "The Boys" officially premiered yesterday on Prime Video, concluding its seven-year run. The core themes of the series have always revolved around the corruption of power and moral dilemmas, presented with a narrative style that combines absurdity and gore. 《黑袍纠察队》第五季大结局已于昨日在 Prime Video 正式上线，历时七年正式收官。该剧的核心议题始终围绕权力腐蚀与道德困境展开，以荒诞与血腥并存的叙事方式呈现。

"The Boys" premiered in 2019, quickly becoming one of the iconic works of the streaming era due to its deconstruction of the superhero genre, violent aesthetics, and political and social satire. 《黑袍纠察队》于 2019 年首播，凭借对超级英雄类型的解构、暴力美学以及政治与社会讽刺，迅速成为流媒体时代的标志性作品之一。

item.title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新海报
item.guid: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新海报
item.description:
Sony Pictures and Marvel Studios yesterday released the latest official poster for "Spider-Man: Brand New Day," with the film set to premiere in North America on July 31st this year. 索尼影业与漫威影业昨日发布了《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》的最新官方海报，影片定档今年 7 月 31 日北美上映。

"Spider-Man: Brand New Day" is the direct sequel to "Spider-Man: No Way Home," set four years after the events of the previous film, with Peter Parker living alone in a city where no one remembers his name, fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man. 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》是《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》的正统续集，故事设定在上一部事件结束四年后，彼得 · 帕克在一座没有人记得他名字的城市里独自生活，全职以蜘蛛侠身份打击犯罪。

item.title: 《瑞克和莫蒂》电影进入早期开发
item.guid: 《瑞克和莫蒂》电影进入早期开发
item.description:
According to Deadline, Warner Bros.' "Rick and Morty" live-action/animated film is currently in early development, with veteran series director Jacob Hair in talks to direct. 据 Deadline 报道，华纳兄弟《瑞克和莫蒂》真人/动画电影目前处于早期开发阶段，系列资深导演 Jacob Hair 正在洽谈执导事宜。

Co-creator Dan Harmon has previously mentioned multiple times his intention to release a "super awesome" feature-length theatrical version, and the launch of this project aligns with his statements over the years. Hair joined the "Rick and Morty" crew in 2019, directed multiple episodes, and served as supervising director. 联合创作人 Dan Harmon 此前多次提及有意推出一集「超级厉害」的长篇剧场版，此次项目的启动与其多年来的表态相符。Hair 于 2019 年加入《瑞克和莫蒂》剧组，执导了多集内容，并担任监制导演一职。

The ninth season of "Rick and Morty" will premiere this Sunday (May 24th). 《瑞克和莫蒂》第九季将于本周日（5 月 24 日）开播。
